title: argemone ochroleuca subsp. stenopetala
intro: Argemone ochroleuca subsp. stenopetala, commonly known as the Mexican prickly poppy, is a plant species belonging to the Papaveraceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, as well as its potential to treat various gastrointestinal issues and respiratory problems. Argemone ochroleuca subsp. stenopetala can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
